characters.description: The narrator, who opens this volume with tales of his life before and just after he was born, then spends the rest of it hunting for a date to the school's Valentine's dance - and ends up exactly where the title says.
characters.name: Greg Heffley

characters.description: Greg's best friend, whose own fortunes at the Valentine's dance rise exactly as Greg's fall.
characters.name: Rowley Jefferson

characters.description: Greg's teenage older brother, a background irritant in this volume.
characters.name: Rodrick Heffley

characters.description: Greg's father, whose patience is tested by a relative moving into the house.
characters.name: Frank Heffley

characters.description: Greg's mother, hospitable as ever when family needs a place to stay.
characters.name: Susan Heffley

characters.description: Greg's uncle, between jobs and between marriages, who moves in with the Heffleys and beds down in the basement while chasing his latest get-rich scheme.
characters.name: Uncle Gary

characters.description: A girl in Greg's year who needs a new escort to the Valentine's dance when her original date pulls out. Greg and Rowley take her together - an arrangement that works out much better for Rowley than for Greg.
characters.name: Abigail
